input:
Subject: Immediate Action Required: Account Verification Needed

Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected unusual activity in your account that requires your immediate attention. To ensure the security of your funds, please verify your identity by clicking the link below:

[Verify Your Account](http://fakebank.com/secure-verification)

Failure to do so within 24 hours will result in a temporary suspension of your account. We understand the urgency of this matter and appreciate your prompt response.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

Customer Support Team
Fake Bank

Note: This is an automated message. Please do not reply.

Dear Customer, 

We need you to update your information for your account due to some recent changes. Please find the attached form and fill it out at your earliest convenience. If you have any questions, do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for your attention. 

Best regards,
Your Trusted Bank 

P.S. We noticed some unusual activity on your account, so timely action is required.

Dear Customer, 

We hope you are doing well. We are reaching out to inform you about an important update regarding your account. Could you please confirm your details at your earliest convenience? 

Please find the file attached for your reference. 

Thank you! 

Best regards,
The Support Team 

P.S. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter, as it is quite urgent.
